entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in the study to evaluate salt stress tolerance.

entities.name: SALT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and productivity under high salinity.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to improve crop traits through selection and crossing.

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups of plants used to link phenotypic traits to specific genomic regions.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per plant or area.

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with salt tolerance.

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: Environmental period characterized by high temperature and high VPD.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Environmental period characterized by lower VPD.

entities.name: VPD
entities.description: Vapor Pressure Deficit, a measure of the drying power of the air.

entities.name: SALINE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environments with high salt concentrations (150 and 200 mM).

entities.name: NON-SALINE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environments with no salt concentration (0 mM).

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration from planting to the onset of flowering.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of grains produced, used as a primary measure of productivity.

entities.name: VEGETATIVE BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant's vegetative parts.

entities.name: EVAPORATIVE DEMAND
entities.description: The atmospheric demand for water, often linked to VPD.

entities.name: REPRODUCTION
entities.description: The biological process of producing offspring/seeds.

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The stage of seed development where dry matter is accumulated.

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Elevated thermal conditions that can stress the plant.

entities.name: DOF
entities.description: Days to flowering, a measure of the plant's developmental timing.

entities.name: GRAIN DENSITY
entities.description: Thousand grain weight, a measure of seed size and weight.

relationships.description: is a correlated trait under salinity
is a correlated trait under salinity
